rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped citation that lists prior variable-selection work to motivate the general idea that decision makers may attend to subsets of attributes. The citing paper does not discuss Kim et al. (2012) separately, does not rely on its specific model structure or estimation procedure, and does not position IAM as a direct extension or refinement of that paper. Its role is background context rather than a distinct intellectual building block in the citing paper's core argument.
